strengths: Meets the minimum requirement of 15+ years of software and infrastructure engineering experience.
Strong entrepreneurial background as a founder and active open-source contributor.
Hands-on experience with cloud infrastructure (Kubernetes, AWS CDK) and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling.
concerns: Lacks recognized, deep expertise in AI/ML platform development required for this specialized role.
Current scope is heavily focused on hands-on coding rather than Director-level strategic leadership.
No evident experience advising strategic enterprise customers on AI and cloud technology adoption.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable Staff Software Engineer with over 15 years of hands-on experience and a strong entrepreneurial drive. However, the Principal Engineer role requires a Director-level AI Strategist with recognized expertise in artificial intelligence and a proven track record of advising enterprise partners. While he has recent exposure to AI tooling, his background lacks the deep AI specialization and strategic customer-facing advisory focus necessary for this level, making him an unsuitable candidate for this specific position.
